description: Create a test gate proving the Lambda/API Gateway implementations cover the behavior currently represented by the remaining Next API routes. Scope: for dashboard, dashboard workflow redirects, billing payment-method, subscription cancel, Stripe webhook, and MDI webhook, compare expected public status codes/body shapes/redirects against existing Next route tests and domain invariants. Prefer handler-level Vitest coverage plus a small staging smoke check list for deployed routes. Include negative tests for auth, origin/CSRF, invalid signatures, oversize payloads, missing config, provider unavailable, and idempotent webhook replay. Acceptance criteria: route parity is documented; tests fail if an expected production API path is missing; static/Vite frontend can rely solely on API Gateway-backed routes.
title: Add route parity tests for Lambda replacements of remaining Next API routes
